zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Vaux於1435年7月出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈洛登時，他的父親WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton61歲，母親Maud Lucy26歲。他於1456年12月22日與Catherine Penyson在義大利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1471年登記服兵役。他去世於1471年5月4日在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年35歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈洛登。

nameMeanings.name: Vaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Vaux was born in July 1435, in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, his father, WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton, was 61 and his mother, Maud Lucy, was 26. He married Catherine Penyson on 22 December 1456, in Italy. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1471. He died on 4 May 1471, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Vaux est né en juillet 1435, à Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Maud Lucy, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Penyson le 22 décembre 1456, à Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1471. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1471, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Vaux im Juli 1435 in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton 61 und seine Mutter Maud Lucy 26. Er hat am 22. Dezember 1456 in Italien Catherine Penyson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1471 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 4. Mai 1471 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Catherine Penyson il 22 dicembre 1456, nel Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1471. ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Vauxが1435年7月にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーロウデンで生まれた時，父WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northamptonは61歳，母Maud Lucyは26歳であった。1456年12月22日にイタリアでCatherine Penysonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年に兵役登録をした。彼は1471年5月4日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで35歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーロウデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Vaux(이)가 1435년 7월 영국 노르섬프토실르 해로우든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Lucy(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1456년 12월 22일 이탈리아에서 Catherine Penyson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1471년 5월 4일 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 해로우든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Vaux nasceu em julho de 1435, em Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Maud Lucy, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Penyson em 22 de dezembro de 1456, em Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1471. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1471, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Vaux родился июль 1435 г. в местности харроуден, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Maud Lucy, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Penyson 22 декабря 1456 г. в местности Италия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1471 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 4 мая 1471 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности харроуден, нортамптоншир, Англия.

Murió el 4 de mayo de 1471, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
